name: medical-protocol
title: Medical Protocol
description: Complete medical protocol component suite with documentation

files.content:
{
  "version": "0.4.0",
  "description": "Building blocks for clinical tools. Each component is a self-contained block that doctors mix and match — combine them into dashboards, embed them in notes, or use them standalone.",
  "context": "Read this first. For full props/types, open the component file (JSDoc header). For composition patterns, see COMPOSITION.md.",
  "shared": {
    "medical-disclaimer": {
      "description": "Medical disclaimer footer — included by all clinical components",
      "import": "@/components/medical-disclaimer",
      "files": [
        "medical-disclaimer.tsx"
      ]
    },
    "layout-disclaimer": {
      "description": "Prominent medical disclaimer banner for app layout — collapsible, covers regulatory/AI/privacy",
      "import": "@/components/layout-disclaimer",
      "files": [
        "layout-disclaimer.tsx"
      ],
      "shadcn": [
        "collapsible"
      ]
    },
    "error-boundary": {
      "description": "Error boundary with recovery UI — wrap top-level pages to prevent white screens",
      "import": "@/components/error-boundary",
      "files": [
        "error-boundary.tsx"
      ]
    }
  },
  "vital-signs": {
    "version": "0.4.0",
    "category": "monitoring",
    "description": "Editable vital signs panel: BP, HR, RR, Temp, SpO2/FiO2",
    "import": "@/components/vital-signs/vital-signs",
    "types": "@/components/vital-signs/types/vital-signs",
    "target": "components/vital-signs",
    "props": {
      "data": "IVitalSignsData — initial values",
      "onData": "(data: IVitalSignsData, fhir?: FhirBundle) => void",
      "editable": "boolean (default true)",
      "useFahrenheit": "boolean (default true)",
      "assistant": "boolean (default true) — AI analysis button",
      "border": "boolean (default true)",
      "assistantRoute": "string — API route for analysis"
    },
    "dataFlow": "bidirectional — receives data, reports changes via onData",
    "popups": {
      "editSection": {
        "positioning": "absolute bottom-10",
        "direction": "above each vital sign input",
        "trigger": "click on a vital sign value when editable=true",
        "content": "save/delete buttons for the edited value"
      },
      "vitalSignsAlert": {
        "positioning": "absolute bottom-[-22px]",
        "direction": "below each vital sign input",
        "trigger": "automatic when value is out of normal range",
        "content": "red warning badge with alert text"
      },
      "assistantAnalysis": {
        "positioning": "absolute top-12 z-50",
        "direction": "below the vitals card",
        "trigger": "click AI analysis button (assistant=true)",
        "content": "AI-generated analysis card"
      },
      "note": "All popups use absolute positioning. Any parent Card wrapping this component MUST use overflow-visible to prevent clipping."
    },
    "shadcn": [
      "card",
      "button",
      "input",
      "select",
      "badge",
      "label",
      "textarea"
    ],
    "externalComponents": [
      "@/hooks/use-mobile"
    ],
    "files": [
      "vital-signs.tsx",
      "components/edit-section.tsx",
      "components/vital-signs-alert.tsx",
      "components/vital-signs-fhir.tsx",
      "hooks/useAnalyze.tsx",
      "hooks/useClickOutside.tsx",
      "hooks/useVitalSigns.tsx",
      "signs/blood-oxygen.tsx",
      "signs/blood-pressure.tsx",
      "signs/heart-rate.tsx",
      "signs/respiratory-rate.tsx",
      "signs/temperature.tsx",
      "types/vital-signs.ts",
      "validations/blood-oxygen-validations.tsx",
      "validations/blood-pressure-validations.tsx",
      "validations/heart-rate-validations.tsx",
      "validations/respiratory-rate-validations.tsx",
      "validations/temperature-validations.tsx"
    ]
  },
  "acid-base": {
    "version": "0.4.0",
    "category": "calculator",
    "description": "ABG analyzer — disorder detection, compensation, anion gap",
    "import": "@/components/acid-base/acid-base",
    "types": "@/components/acid-base/types/interfaces",
    "target": "components/acid-base",
    "props": {
      "onData": "(result: Result | null) => void — required, fires on every input change and on mount with null"
    },
    "dataFlow": "output only — reports Result via onData",
    "popups": {
      "resultBadges": {
        "positioning": "inline flow below inputs",
        "direction": "below the input fields",
        "trigger": "automatic when valid analysis results are available",
        "content": "badges showing disorders, compensation, expected values, anion gap"
      },
      "note": "Result badges render inline below inputs — no absolute positioning, no overflow-visible needed on parent Cards."
    },
    "shadcn": [
      "card",
      "input",
      "label",
      "badge"
    ],
    "files": [
      "acid-base.tsx",
      "analyze.ts",
      "components/popup.tsx",
      "types/interfaces.ts",
      "utils/safeFloat.ts"
    ]
  },
  "bmi": {
    "version": "0.4.0",
    "category": "calculator",
    "description": "BMI calculator with imperial/metric toggle and category badges",
    "import": "@/components/bmi/bmi-calculator",
    "target": "components/bmi",
    "props": "none — self-contained",
    "dataFlow": "none — internal state only",
    "shadcn": [
      "card",
      "input",
      "button",
      "badge"
    ],
    "files": [
      "bmi-calculator.tsx"
    ]
  },
  "telemonitoring": {
    "version": "0.4.0",
    "category": "monitoring",
    "description": "Real-time pulse oximetry with animated heartbeat, BPM/SpO2",
    "import": "@/components/telemonitoring/pulse-oximetry/pulse-oximetry",
    "target": "components/telemonitoring",
    "props": {
      "bpm": "number",
      "spo2": "number",
      "isBeating": "boolean"
    },
    "dataFlow": "input only — display, no callbacks",
    "shadcn": [],
    "files": [
      "pulse-oximetry/pulse-oximetry.tsx",
      "pulse-oximetry/pulse-oximetry-simulator.tsx"
    ]
  },
  "water-balance": {
    "version": "0.4.0",
    "category": "calculator",
    "description": "Fluid intake/output tracker with insensible loss and net balance",
    "import": "@/components/water-balance/water-balance",
    "target": "components/water-balance",
    "props": {
      "data": "{ weight?, intakeOral?, intakeIv?, diuresis?, defecations? } — all number | string"
    },
    "dataFlow": "input only — no callbacks, display + edit",
    "shadcn": [
      "card",
      "input",
      "button",
      "badge",
      "label"
    ],
    "files": [
      "water-balance.tsx"
    ]
  },
  "timeline": {
    "version": "0.4.0",
    "category": "display",
    "description": "Scrollable clinical timeline with duration badges and popovers",
    "import": "@/components/timeline/timeline",
    "target": "components/timeline",
    "props": {
      "items": "TimelineItem[] — { label, timestamp (unix s), title, description, popoverContent }",
      "maxHeight": "string (default '32rem')"
    },
    "dataFlow": "input only — read-only display",
    "popups": {
      "timelinePopover": {
        "positioning": "shadcn Popover — side='right' align='start'",
        "direction": "right of each timeline date button",
        "trigger": "click on a timeline date entry",
        "content": "clinical event details (w-80 popover)"
      },
      "note": "Uses shadcn Popover (portal-based, z-50). No overflow-visible needed on parent."
    },
    "shadcn": [
      "button",
      "popover",
      "badge"
    ],
    "files": [
      "timeline.tsx"
    ]
  },
  "pafi": {
    "version": "0.4.0",
    "category": "calculator",
    "description": "PaO2/FiO2 ratio calculator with ARDS classification",
    "import": "@/components/pafi/pafi-calculator",
    "target": "components/pafi",
    "props": "none — self-contained",
    "dataFlow": "none — internal state only",
    "popups": {
      "resultBadges": {
        "positioning": "inline flow below inputs",
        "direction": "below the input fields",
        "trigger": "automatic when valid PaO2 and FiO2 values are entered",
        "content": "PaFi ratio badge + ARDS classification badge"
      },
      "note": "Result badges render inline below inputs — no absolute positioning, no overflow-visible needed on parent Cards."
    },
    "shadcn": [
      "card",
      "input",
      "button",
      "badge",
      "label"
    ],
    "files": [
      "pafi-calculator.tsx"
    ]
  },
  "dka": {
    "version": "0.4.0",
    "category": "monitoring",
    "description": "DKA monitoring with hourly tracking, blood gas analysis (disorders, compensation, anion gap, delta ratio via acid-base analyzer)",
    "import": "@/components/dka/dka-monitor",
    "types": "@/components/dka/types/dka",
    "target": "components/dka",
    "props": {
      "data": "DKAPatientData — initial patient data with readings",
      "onData": "(data: DKAPatientData) => void"
    },
    "dataFlow": "bidirectional — receives data, reports changes via onData",
    "popups": {
      "resultBadges": {
        "positioning": "inline flow below inputs",
        "direction": "below the input fields",
        "trigger": "automatic when readings are available",
        "content": "rate badges, resolution criteria badges, potassium classification"
      },
      "note": "All results render inline — no absolute positioning, no overflow-visible needed on parent Cards."
    },
    "shadcn": [
      "card",
      "input",
      "button",
      "badge",
      "label",
      "separator"
    ],
    "dependencies": ["acid-base"],
    "files": [
      "dka-monitor.tsx",
      "types/dka.ts"
    ]
  },
  "clinical-notes": {
    "version": "0.4.0",
    "category": "documentation",
    "description": "Focused encounter note editor with clinical highlighting and local storage",
    "import": "@/components/clinical-notes/clinical-notes",
    "target": "components/clinical-notes",
    "props": "none — self-contained",
    "dataFlow": "none — orchestrates WaterBalance, AcidBase, BMI as inline tools",
    "popups": {
      "loadingOverlay": {
        "positioning": "absolute inset-0 z-10 backdrop-blur-sm",
        "direction": "full-screen overlay covering the form",
        "trigger": "while saving/analyzing a clinical note",
        "content": "spinner with 'Guardando nota médica...' message"
      },
      "alertDialog": {
        "positioning": "shadcn AlertDialog (portal-based, centered modal)",
        "trigger": "click FilePlus button to create new evolution",
        "content": "confirmation dialog with cancel/accept"
      },
      "prevEvolutionsDrawer": {
        "positioning": "shadcn Drawer (portal-based, slides from bottom)",
        "trigger": "click FileClock button",
        "content": "previous medical records list (max-h-[85vh])"
      },
      "toolSelect": {
        "positioning": "shadcn Select (portal-based dropdown)",
        "trigger": "click 'Agregar' tool selector",
        "content": "dropdown with Balance hídrico, EAB, BMI options"
      },
      "note": "All popups use shadcn portal-based components (z-50). No overflow-visible needed."
    },
    "shadcn": [
      "card",
      "button",
      "input",
      "textarea",
      "select",
      "tabs",
      "separator",
      "scroll-area",
      "alert-dialog",
      "badge"
    ],
    "externalComponents": [
      "@/components/water-balance/water-balance",
      "@/components/acid-base/acid-base",
      "@/components/bmi/bmi-calculator",
      "@/components/ui/textarea-inv"
    ],
    "files": [
      "clinical-notes.tsx",
      "page.tsx",
      "clock/clock.tsx",
      "patient-details/patient-details.tsx",
      "prev-evolutions/prev-evolutions.tsx",
      "references/references.tsx",
      "utils/generateHighlightedHTML.ts"
    ]
  }
}
